chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3251 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 15392/2023 2. For hearing of main case 21.02.2025 Mr. Osman Yousuf advocate for the petitioner Ms. Rehmat-un-Nisa, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly stated that this petition is covered by the Division Bench judgment of this court reported as 2022 CLC 2002, therefore, may be disposed off in the same terms and on the basis of the reasoning assigned therein. Order accordingly. Petition is disposed off as aforesaid. Judge Judge Amjad
